{"cards": [{"name": "Ember Charger", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Horse", "oracle_text": "Haste
Trample", "flavor_text": "Born from the volcanic forges, it knows no fear and no rest.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Red common creature testing aggressive statlines with keyword-only design. 3/2 haste trample for 3 mana is slightly above the curve but within acceptable range for red's aggressive philosophy. Trample pairs well with haste for immediate board impact."}, {"name": "Skyrender Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, haste
When ~ enters, it deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.
Whenever ~ attacks, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token with haste that's tapped and attacking.", "flavor_text": "Where it soars, armies follow in its wake.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Mythic red dragon with multiple abilities creating immediate board impact. ETB damage provides versatility, while attack trigger creates ongoing value and pressure. 5/4 flying haste body is appropriately sized for 6 mana mythic. Multi-target damage and token generation showcase red's aggressive and chaotic nature."}, {"name": "Verdant Exploration", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path through the wilderness leads to new discoveries.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple green land search effect testing 'search your library' templating. At 2 mana for a basic land to hand, it's appropriately costed for common ramp. The reveal requirement is standard templating for search effects that put cards into hand rather than play."}, {"name": "Ironbark Crusher", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps shake the earth, and its charge breaks the enemy line.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Common green creature testing the P/T ceiling. 5/4 for 5 mana hits the CMC + 4 guideline (barely acceptable for common). Trample is the perfect keyword for a large green creature, enabling damage to get through even when blocked. Simple and clean design focusing on green's strength in large creatures."}, {"name": "Symbiotic Growth", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "At the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
{3}{G}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a creature card with mana value 3 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Uncommon green enchantment with two abilities testing enchantment templating. Provides ongoing value through +1/+1 counters, plus a sacrifice effect for creature tutoring. The mana value restriction keeps the tutor effect balanced. Multi-ability design appropriate for uncommon complexity level, showcasing green's creature synergies."}]}
